methods.description: This method investigates the impact of analytical smoothing on Tunu13 CO patterns by convoluting a Tunu13-like synthetic CO signal with the Green function of the 2013 DRI CFA setup.

steps.description: Convolute a Tunu13-like synthetic CO signal with the Green function of the 2013 DRI CFA setup.
steps.searchable_summary: apply convolution to synthetic CO signal using Green function
inputs: Green function of 2013 DRI CFA setup

steps.description: Extract a 5th percentile baseline from the smoothed synthetic signal produced by the convolution.
steps.searchable_summary: extract 5th percentile baseline from smoothed signal

steps.description: Compare the baseline obtained to the original synthetic signal to confirm the positive bias introduced by CFA analytical smoothing.
steps.searchable_summary: compare baseline to original signal to assess bias
